project.name: RAGFlow
project.stack: Flask backend, React/TypeScript frontend (UmiJS, Ant Design), Docker Compose, MySQL, Elasticsearch/Infinity, Redis, MinIO; iOS: SwiftUI, GRDB, EPUBKit, PDFKit, Accelerate, marmelroy/Zip

completed: Phase 1–4: All previously complete (P1.1–P1.6, P2, P2.5, iOS live testing phases 1–4)
- marmelroy/Zip wired into project.pbxproj (XCRemoteSwiftPackageReference, product dep, frameworks phase)
- OfficeParser.swift: DOCX (w:p/w:t extraction), XLSX (sharedStrings + sheet1 → TSV), PPTX (per-slide XML strip)
- EMLParser.swift: pure Swift RFC 2822, multipart/alternative, quoted-printable + base64
- RAGService: ingestDOCX/XLSX/PPTX/EML methods, updated switch + error message
- DatabaseService v5 migration: workflows + workflow_runs tables, full CRUD
- Services/Agent/WorkflowStep.swift: StepType enum, WorkflowStep model, StepContext + render()
- Services/Agent/WorkflowTemplate.swift: 5 templates — RAG Q&A, Deep Summarizer, Keyword Expander, Multi-Hop Researcher, Balanced Analysis
- Services/Agent/WorkflowRunner.swift: @MainActor execution engine, streaming output, step log
- Features/Workflows/WorkflowDetailView.swift: pipeline card, run button, streaming output, run history
- ContentView: Workflows tab on iPhone (3rd tab); KBListView: Workflows sheet button for iPad
- All new files registered in project.pbxproj (fileRefs, buildFiles, Agent + Workflows groups, Sources phase)
next_steps: P7.1 — Fresh install wipe test end-to-end on real device
P7.2 — Replace silent try? with proper error propagation; fix try! migrate() crash risk
— Set DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in Xcode Signing & Capabilities for real-device deployment
— Add Categorize node type to WorkflowRunner for branching workflows
— Add workflow edit UI (change KB, rename)

phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase1: COMPLETE — ATS plist, AppIcon asset catalog, PBXResourcesBuildPhase
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase2: COMPLETE — API guards, provider banner, Settings accessible, debug helpers
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase3: COMPLETE — chat history persisted to SQLite (messages + message_sources)
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase4: COMPLETE — ingest off main thread, scan-once guard, phase progress labels
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase5_formats: COMPLETE — DOCX/XLSX/PPTX via Zip, EML pure Swift

known_gaps.code_signing: DEVELOPMENT_TEAM not set — user must configure in Xcode for real device
known_gaps.try_bang_migrate: DatabaseService.init uses try! migrate() — crashes on migration failure
known_gaps.workflow_edit: No UI to edit an existing workflow's name or KB after creation — delete and recreate
